titles.title: Roco Wangguo 3: Sheng Long De Shouhu

data.title: Roco Wangguo 3: Sheng Long De Shouhu
I Wanna Be Your Friend
data.synopsis: An award-winning short film following a claymation figure trying to befriend others. As stated in the video's official synopsis, "For friendship it is the most important to be cooperative."
data.background: This short won the 17th Bucheon International Animation Festival, Student Film Competition Audience Award in 2015.

titles.title: I Think You're a Little Confused
I Think You're a Little Confused
I Think You're a Little Confused

data.title: I Think You're a Little Confused
data.title_english: I Think You're a Little Confused
data.title_japanese: I Think You're a Little Confused
data.synopsis:
One day a letter takes a blood-sausage to his friend, liver-sausage. So, he went...

(Source: Geidai Animation)
data.background: This short was screened at the 62nd Oberhausen International Short Film Festival and at the Aichi Triennale 2016. It was animator Iku Ogawa's graduate work at Tokyo University of the Arts.
